---
title: "ARCS"
---

## July 2026 ARCS 2.0 Workshop Schedule 

| Date | Time | Lesson |
|------|------|--------|
| Thursday, July 10 | 9:30–10:30 AM | [Fundamentals of R](workshops/arcs_01/01-fundamentals.qmd) |
| Thursday, July 10 | 10:30–11:30 AM | [Project Management](workshops/arcs_01/02-projects.qmd) |
| Thursday, July 17 | 9:30–10:30 AM | [Data Structures](workshops/arcs_02/03-structures.qmd) |
| Thursday, July 17 | 10:30–11:30 AM | [Reports](workshops/arcs_02/04-reports.qmd) |
| Thursday, July 24 | 9:30–10:30 AM | [Tidyverse](workshops/arcs_03/05-tidyverse.qmd) |
| Thursday, July 24 | 10:30–11:30 AM | [Git & Version Control](workshops/arcs_03/06-git.qmd) |
| Thursday, July 31 | 9:30–10:30 AM | [DESeq2](workshops/arcs_04/07-deseq2.qmd) |
| Thursday, July 31 | 10:30–11:30 AM | [Apptainer](workshops/arcs_04/08-apptainer.qmd) |



This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
